message:
Fix quickstart: auto-generate JWT_SECRET for production mode (#847)

The console binary requires JWT_SECRET in production mode but start.sh
didn't set it, causing a FATAL error on startup. Generate a random
secret using openssl (with /dev/urandom fallback).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -211,6 +211,15 @@ if [ -x "$INSTALL_DIR/kc-agent" ]; then
     sleep 1
 fi
 
+# Generate JWT_SECRET if not set (required in production mode)
+if [ -z "$JWT_SECRET" ]; then
+    if command -v openssl &>/dev/null; then
+        export JWT_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32)
+    else
+        export JWT_SECRET=$(head -c 32 /dev/urandom | od -An -tx1 | tr -d ' \n')
+    fi
+fi
+
 # Start console (serves frontend from web/dist at the specified port)
 echo "Starting console on port $PORT..."
 cd "$INSTALL_DIR"
